channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: This vehicle consistently parks on the kerbside and driveway in front of my house, 13th March
item.description:
This vehicle parks on the pavement and obstructs my driveway- 86 Crayford Way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-8, Crayford Way, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole around drain, 13th March
item.description:
Damaged road surface around drain resulting in a pothole close to the bicycle lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yet more potholes, 13th March
item.description:
Please check and repair. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Petersham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London

item.title: More potholes, 13th March
item.description:
Please repair. Many thank

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Petersham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven Road Surface, 13th March
item.description:
Uneven road surface at Traffic Light on the cycle stop box heading towards Euston rd 3rd lane near Pizza Pylgrim Shop Causes cyclists and vehicles to nearly lose control of vehicles
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-4, Caledonian Road, Barnsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa cushion flytipped on Marmont Road, 13th March
item.description:
Please take this away

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Marmont Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Windows covered in graffiti and fly posting, 13th March
item.description:
Please remove the graffiti covering the window portions of this shelter and remove the persistent fly posting.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hanover Park, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Graffiiti tag on green utility unit, 13th March
item.description:
On hanover park. please clean off. near Morrisons car park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14-16, Hanover Park, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on pink utility unity - Hanover Park Road, 13th March
item.description:
Please cover this graffiti tag. near Specsavers

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14-16, Hanover Park, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Specsavers shop front graffitied - Hanover Park Road, 13th March
item.description:
Please cover the graffiti tag

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hanover Park, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Telephone box graffitied, 13th March
item.description:
Please clean the graffiti from this telephone box. If it can't be maintained it must be removed. No one uses these things anymore and they take up space on the path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hanover Park, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus shelter graffitied with black tag, 13th March
item.description:
Please remove this graffiti tag

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hanover Park, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Bulky waste, 13th March
item.description:
Abandoned furnitures. Cleaning staff didn't collect it. Please send someone over ASAP to get rid of it as it's been there for weeks already. Please also give a clean to the whole street which is full of litter. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Utility unit graffitied, 13th March
item.description:
Please clean off tag

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51-57, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two sofas flytipped outside primary school, 13th March
item.description:
Please remove these two large sofas. Putting a 'please take' sign on them doesn't make it not flytipping. Check CCTV please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Marmont Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box belonging to 79 Fenham Road flytipped, 13th March
item.description:
Please remove and investigate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Elcot Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two paving slabs are dangerously protruding above the level of other pavement., 13th March
item.description:
Two complete concrete paving slabs between the properties wall and the grass verge are jutting up above the level of the remaining slabs. I've tripped over them once and I imagine others have done so also.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodhurst Avenue, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Major pot whole, 13th March
item.description:
3rd lane heading east before the Marylebone high street right turn lane. Major Pot whole could cause vehicle damage
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marylebone Road, Marylebone, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White graffiti on brick wall in Railway Avenue, 13th March
item.description:
White graffiti on brick wall in Railway Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Railway Avenue, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car with license plate EK54EGJ left abandoned, 13th March
item.description:
It is difficult for us to take out van out and bring it back. From footages we saw how the scrap people have dumped it in front of our house. So removing that would be helpful for us.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Drive, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
